name: ui-skills
description: Clone a live website into React + Tailwind. Three core benefits: (1) CSS-First — downloads original stylesheets and reuses class names for pixel-perfect reproduction instead of guessing from computed values. (2) Zero-vision-token verification — AE/SSIM image diff replaces LLM screenshot reading across all comparisons. (3) Real JS bundle extraction — parses GSAP timelines, Framer Motion springs, Lenis scroll params from live bundles, not heuristics. Automated verification pipeline (auto-verify.sh), bundle-based verification for untriggerable animations, and anti-rationalization enforcement. Four skills with progressive-disclosure sub-docs loaded only when needed.
